name: runecho
description: RunEcho's own plugin marketplace — the edit-time hallucination guard, distributed the way Claude Code expects rather than as a settings.json snippet to hand-merge.

plugins.name: runecho-guard
plugins.description: Deterministic pre-write hallucination gate. Requires the runecho-guard binary (bash install.sh, or a release tarball); the plugin wires the hook, it does not ship the binary.
